gazette: Official Gazette dated 02 April 2023 and numbered 32151
title: the Medical Device Regulation and the In Vitro Diagnostic Medical Devices are amended
bodyHtml:
Changes have been made to the dates for the placing on the market of certain products within the scope of the Medical Device Regulations.

Devices with a valid certificate issued under the old Medical Device Regulation or the Active Implantable Medical Devices Regulation, except for Class IIb implantable devices other than sutures, staples, dental fillings, dental braces, dental crowns, screws, wedges, plates, wires, pins, clips and connectors, may be placed on the market or put into service until the following dates:

1.Class III devices and Class IIb implantable devices other than sutures, staples, dental fillings, dental braces, dental crowns, screws, wedges, plates, wires, pins, clips and connectors, until 31/12/2027.

2.Class IIb devices, Class IIa devices and Class I devices placed on the market in a sterile condition or with a measuring function, except for those covered under the first sub-paragraph above, until 31/12/2028.

Devices for which a conformity assessment procedure did not require involvement of a notified body under the old Medical Device Regulation repealed by Article 110, and for which a conformity declaration has been drawn up before 26/5/2021, and which require involvement of a notified body for conformity assessment under this Regulation, may be placed on the market or put into service until 31/12/2028.

Changes have also been made to the In Vitro Diagnostic Medical Devices Regulation. Devices placed on the market legally before 26/5/2022 under the repealed In Vitro Diagnostic Medical Devices Regulation, and those placed on the market legally from 26/5/2022 onwards according to the fourth paragraph, may continue to be placed on the market or put into service.
